Still debating the greatest defense EVER?

AC Milan's 1993/94 squad isn't just about winning Serie A by conceding ONLY 15 goals in 34 games. They then WRECKED Cruyff's 'Dream Team' Barcelona 4-0 in the Champions League final. Peak tactical domination. That backline was DIFFERENT.

Only three points separate six teams in the Premier League, from 6th place Chelsea to 11th place Bournemouth, making the battle for European spots incredibly tight after 32 games!

He single-handedly dragged Argentina to '86 glory with moments of pure, audacious genius. One was the crown jewel of an empire, the other was the empire.
